endpoints.name: GET /v1/Conferences
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Conferences/{ConferenceSid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{CONFERENCESID}} with a real conferencesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Conferences/{ConferenceSid}/Participants
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{CONFERENCESID}} with a real conferencesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Conferences/{ConferenceSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Conference Participant Summary.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{CONFERENCESID}} with a real conferencesid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Video/Rooms
endpoints.description: Get a list of Programmable Video Rooms.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Video/Rooms/{RoomSid}
endpoints.description: Get Video Log Analyzer data for a Room.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Video/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants
endpoints.description: Get a list of room participants.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Video/Rooms/{RoomSid}/Participants/{ParticipantSid}
endpoints.description: Get Video Log Analyzer data for a Room Participant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ROOMSID}} with a real roomsid. Replace {{PARTICIPANTSID}} with a real participantsid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.
